ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media asset */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of media asset (e.g., image, video, audio) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the media asset in bytes */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the media asset (e.g., JPEG, PNG, MP4) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the media asset */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Keywords or tags associated with the media asset */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the media asset */,
  "cached_url" TEXT /* Cached URL of the media asset */,
  "image_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the image for integrity checks */,
  "last_hash_check" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last hash check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the asset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the asset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the asset (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the media asset */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the media asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_assets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_assets_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_assets_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES asset_status ("status_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the media asset */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the media asset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the asset */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the media asset for this version */,
  "cached_url" TEXT /* Cached URL of the media asset for this version */,
  "image_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the image for integrity checks for this version */,
  "last_hash_check" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last hash check for this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_versions_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES asset_status ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_versions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, content manager, developer) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media asset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the media asset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the asset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the media asset was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser or device used to access the media asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "status_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the status (e.g., green for active, red for inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "asset_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first media asset in the relationship */,
  "asset_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second media asset in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., poster, thumbnail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_relationships_asset_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id_1") REFERENCES media_assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_relationships_asset_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id_2") REFERENCES media_assets ("asset_id")
)
